tree.name: Jaylen Wells
tree.note: Washington State guard; drafted 39th overall by Memphis using pick acquired from Houston

assetsGivenUp.name: 2024 2nd Round Pick (#39)
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Grizzlies traded Steven Adams to Rockets for Victor Oladipo, a 2024 2nd round pick (#39, Jaylen Wells), a 2024 2nd round pick (#57, Ulrich Chomche) and a 2025 2nd round pick (Will Richard)
assetsGivenUp.note: Pick acquired from HOU in Steven Adams trade

assetsGivenUp.name: Steven Adams
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: 3-team trade: MEM traded Jonas Valanciunas, Trey Murphy III (#17), and Brandon Boston Jr. (#51) to NOP; NOP traded Steven Adams, Eric Bledsoe, Jared Butler, Ziaire Williams, 2022 2nd (Vince Williams Jr.) and 2025 2nd to MEM; Charlotte involved in side deals
assetsGivenUp.note: Kiwi center; acquired from New Orleans in Jonas Valanciunas 3-team trade, then traded to Houston

assetsGivenUp.name: Jonas Valanciunas
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Memphis traded Marc Gasol to Toronto for C.J. Miles, Jonas Valanciunas, Delon Wright and a 2024 2nd round pick (Juan Nunez)
assetsGivenUp.note: Lithuanian center, acquired from Toronto in Marc Gasol trade, re-signed as FA Jul 2019

assetsGivenUp.name: Marc Gasol
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: MEM traded Pau Gasol and 2010 2nd (Devin Ebanks) to LAL for Kwame Brown, Javaris Crittenton, Marc Gasol, Aaron McKie, 2008 1st (#28 Donté Greene) and 2010 1st (Greivis Vásquez)
assetsGivenUp.note: Spanish center, key long-term piece from the Pau Gasol blockbuster

assetsGivenUp.name: Pau Gasol
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Vancouver Grizzlies traded Shareef Abdur-Rahim and draft rights to Jamaal Tinsley (#27) to Atlanta Hawks for draft rights to Pau Gasol (#3), Brevin Knight and Lorenzen Wright
assetsGivenUp.note: 2001 #3 overall pick; drafted by ATL, rights traded to Vancouver Grizzlies

assetsGivenUp.name: Shareef Abdur-Rahim
assetsGivenUp.note: 1996 #3 overall pick by Vancouver Grizzlies; franchise's first star player

assetsGivenUp.name: 2001 1st Round Pick (#27)
assetsGivenUp.note: Draft rights traded to ATL in Pau Gasol deal

assetsGivenUp.name: 2010 2nd Round Pick (#43)
assetsGivenUp.note: Sent to LAL in Pau Gasol trade

assetsGivenUp.name: 2021 1st Round Pick (#17)
assetsGivenUp.note: MEM's own 2021 1st round pick, used to draft Trey Murphy III and sent to NOP in JV/Adams trade

assetsGivenUp.name: 2021 2nd Round Pick (#51)
assetsGivenUp.note: MEM's own 2021 2nd round pick, used to draft Brandon Boston Jr. and sent to NOP in JV/Adams trade
